summary: Comprehensive testing of BlackieFi 3.0 Code Quality Review Fixes. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly. Token storage correctly uses sessionStorage instead of localStorage.

issues: Minor React console warning about span inside option - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality (known issue from iteration_6)

critical_code_review_comments: tokenStorage.js correctly implements sessionStorage abstraction with getToken, setToken, getUser, setUser, getEntityId, setEntityId, clear methods
api.js correctly uses tokenStorage for auth token and entity ID
App.js useAuth hook correctly uses tokenStorage for login/logout/session management
BillPayPage.jsx correctly extracts BillPayForm, ScheduleCard, PaymentHistoryTable components
AuditLogPage.jsx correctly extracts AuditFilterPanel, AuditLogTable components
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing demo user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality review fixes verified. Key changes: (1) Token storage migrated from localStorage to sessionStorage via tokenStorage.js abstraction, (2) BillPayPage and AuditLogPage components extracted into subcomponents, (3) Backend functions decomposed into helpers. All features working correctly.

sessionStorage_token_handling.login: Token stored in sessionStorage after login (verified)
sessionStorage_token_handling.logout: sessionStorage cleared on logout (token, user, currentEntityId all removed)

dashboard_unified.data_structure: Returns total_balance, total_debt, total_investments, monthly_income, monthly_expenses
dashboard_unified.frontend: Dashboard renders stat cards, upcoming items, recent transactions

transactions_search.data_structure: Returns items, total, page, page_size, total_pages, summary (total_income, total_expenses, net)
transactions_search.filters: Supports transaction_type, category_id, start_date, end_date, min_amount, max_amount, sort_by, sort_order, page, page_size

billpay_schedules.frontend: BillPayPage renders with extracted BillPayForm, ScheduleCard, PaymentHistoryTable components

audit_log.frontend: AuditLogPage renders with extracted AuditFilterPanel, AuditLogTable components

budget_variance.data_structure: Returns reports array and trend object

roles_permissions.frontend: Settings > Roles tab shows Admin, Power User, Regular User with permission groups

pdf_export.frontend: PDFExportPage shows Dashboard Report, Transaction Report, Portfolio Report with download buttons

cross_entity.frontend: CrossEntityPage shows Combined Net Worth, entity cards with Switch to Entity buttons

code_quality_fixes_verified.hardcoded_secrets_replaced: Test credentials now use os.environ.get() - verified in test file
code_quality_fixes_verified.localStorage_to_sessionStorage: tokenStorage.js uses sessionStorage - verified via browser automation
code_quality_fixes_verified.empty_catch_blocks: Catch blocks now log errors (e.g., console.warn in App.js logout)
code_quality_fixes_verified.array_index_keys_replaced: DashboardPage and CalendarPage use unique data IDs (item.id or composite keys)
code_quality_fixes_verified.frontend_components_extracted: Verified: BillPayForm, ScheduleCard, PaymentHistoryTable in BillPayPage; AuditFilterPanel, AuditLogTable in AuditLogPage
